title: [IR] Taiwan Train Pack For Immersive Railroading
description: Taiwan train for Immersive Railroading mod
body:
# This Resourcespack is made by DE_Ket, made for Immersive Railroading mod

Taiwan Train, include conventional 1067mm Railway, 762mm Sugar Railway & Alishan Forest Railway, 1435mm High-Speed Railway
Most of Rolling-stock have Animation, like Pantograph,Doors,Wiper

Do not use the model for commercial use

# Rolling-stocks list：

## 臺灣高鐵 / Taiwan High-Speed Rail
### 電聯車 / Electric Multiple-Unit
THSR 700T 高速電聯車 High-Speed EMU
